title: Lucilia lopezmirandae
taxonomy: Lucilia lopezmirandae is classified within the family Calliphoridae, commonly known as blowflies. This classification places it within the order Diptera, which includes flies and other related insects. Furthermore, Lucilia lopezmirandae is a species of fly and belongs to the genus Lucilia, characterized by its distinctive physical and behavioral traits. The species is found primarily in specific regions and is of interest in forensic entomology due to its role in decomposition processes. Lucilia lopezmirandae's classification is used to study its ecological and behavioral patterns.
